## Summary
Sprint 3 deliverables show structural completeness but contain critical inconsistencies. Three different backtests of the same pipeline produce wildly different results (0% / 25% / 61% win rate). Duplicate market pair exposure across clusters inflates signal count. Tina's QA (T570) has not started. **No deliverable passes quality gate without rework.**

## Trends
Quality DEGRADING vs Sprint 2. Multiple agents producing conflicting results for the same pipeline. Lack of coordination on shared standards (P&L model, signal format).

## Recommendations
1. **Bob + Dave**: Agree on ONE P&L calculation model, document in knowledge.md
2. **Bob**: Deduplicate signals — same market pair in different clusters should not generate separate trades
3. **Dave**: Re-run backtest using Bob's actual trade_signals.json (18 signals), not regenerated ones
4. **Tina**: Start T570 immediately — team blocked on QA gate
5. **Alice**: Hold all Sprint 3 approvals until Q1 (conflicting results) is resolved
